blocks.text: Disconnect the coupler (A). Verify that the actuator operates on the locked or unlocked side when battery voltage is applied between each terminal of the coupler (B). If the actuator does not operate, the tailgate lock actuator is defective, Replace the tailgate lock (C). Connect the coupler.

items: When applying battery voltage to the actuator, connect the 12V battery (-) momentarily. Prolonged connection will damage the actuator.
When applying battery voltage, be very careful not to short-circuit the battery.

items.text: When applying battery voltage to the actuator, connect the 12V battery (-) momentarily. Prolonged connection will damage the actuator.
When applying battery voltage to the actuator, connect the 12V battery (-) momentarily. Prolonged connection will damage the actuator.
When applying battery voltage, be very careful not to short-circuit the battery.
When applying battery voltage, be very careful not to short-circuit the battery.

blocks.text: Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
